_meta.definition: secured_gross_mw = energized + committed/under-construction gross facility power, MW. Speculative pipeline and pending interconnection EXCLUDED. Where the company discloses only critical IT load, converted x1.25 and flagged in basis.
_meta.refresh_rule: Refresh at quarterly rescore and on earnings (rule 9 pass). Used by batch_score.py to compute EV/MW for the Layer 9 capacity cohort (rule 13).
_meta.band_anchor: AI DC replacement cost ~$9-10M per gross MW (~$11-12M per IT MW), facility+power excl. IT gear

CRWV.basis: company 'contracted power', IT-vs-gross unspecified (treated gross, flagged)

NBIS.basis: company 'contracted power', IT-vs-gross unspecified (treated gross, flagged); >75% owned

APLD.basis: 600 MW critical IT contracted (PF1 400 CoreWeave + PF2 200 hyperscaler) x1.25 = 750 gross-equiv + 286 MW legacy hosting gross
APLD.asof: 2026-01-07 (fiscal Q2 FY26; ~6 months stale, fiscal Q3 print may exist)
APLD.source: ir.applieddigital.com fiscal Q2 2026 results + Nov 24 2025 RFS release

IREN.basis: company 'secured power and land portfolio', gross transmission MW
IREN.source: IREN Business Update & Q3 FY26 Results, GlobeNewswire May 7 2026

CORZ.basis: 1.9 GW gross utility power across 10 sites (1.3 GW leasable; CoreWeave 590 MW critical IT within it)

CIFR.basis: operating + contracted gross (207 mining + ~700 HPC under construction incl. Barber Lake 300, Black Pearl 300, 3rd campus 100, Stingray 100)
CIFR.source: Cipher Q1 2026 Business Update, GlobeNewswire May 5 2026

CLSK.basis: total contracted gross utility power, owned/leased sites; zero AI/HPC MW contracted to date

BTDR.basis: 1,744 MW online gross + ~735 committed (Clarington OH 570 utility-confirmed + Tydal ~165 in construction); company does not publish clean secured split
BTDR.source: Bitdeer April 2026 Production & Operations Update, May 12 2026

HUT.basis: 1,020 MW energy capacity under management + 330 under construction (gross); 1,230 'under development' excluded; May 2026 352 MW TX lease sits within development
HUT.source: Hut 8 Q1 2026 results May 6 2026 + Dec 17 2025 Anthropic/Fluidstack announcement

KEEL.basis: 341 MW energized + 430 MW secured (executed utility agreements), gross grid power; 1.5 GW expansion pipeline excluded

RIOT.basis: 1.7 GW fully ERCOT-approved gross across Rockdale + Corsicana; AMD lease 50 MW critical IT within it

WULF.basis: ~438 MW HPC critical IT contracted (Fluidstack ~360 + Core42 + Abernathy 168 IT) x1.25 gross-equiv; mining MW at Lake Mariner shares site power, excluded to avoid double count
WULF.source: TeraWulf Q1 2026 results + Fluidstack PRs Aug 2025

WYFI.basis: NC-1 54 MW Duke-energized gross + Enovum Montreal 16 MW (MTL-1/2/3); NC-1 +45 MW 2027 phase EXCLUDED (no binding construction contract — counting it gives 115 MW / $9.8M/MW / band 45 vs base 70 MW / $16.1M/MW / band 30 — STRADDLES BAND, flagged for Dom)
WYFI.source: WYFI Q1 2026 results PR + transcript; Nscale 40MW/$865M 8-K

SHAZ.basis: 102 MW contracted + ~30 other secured; ONLY ~2 MW ENERGIZED (~98% un-energized — unlike all cohort peers; EV/MW is a backlog bet, not an asset read). ESDS anchor counterparty solvency contested (Bleecker St short report)

HIVE.basis: 440 MW operating gross (Canada+Sweden+Paraguay, predominantly BTC mining; AI-grade critical IT energized <10 MW) + 100 MW Paraguay Yguazu Phase-3 under construction (commissioning Q3 2026). EXCLUDED as development: GTA Gigafactory 320 MW (announced 2026-05-18, H2 2027, $3.5B campus financing incomplete), Grand Falls 70 + Toronto Airport 7 (construction status unconfirmed) — same standard that excluded HUT's development tranche. Aggressive alternative incl. Canadian HPC pipeline = 840 MW (subagent's proposal, flagged).
HIVE.source: HIVE FY2026 results PR + DCD Yguazu 400MW expansion + GTA Gigafactory announcement
